messages.content: You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
After my son left for Qatar, I kept his room exactly as he left it. I didn't move a single thing for two years.
{"implied_emotion": "grief and longing", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "preserving room unchanged for two years"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
When they placed my first grandchild in my arms, I didn't know what to do with my hands. I just stood very still.
{"implied_emotion": "overwhelm and joy", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "freezing, stillness, not knowing what to do"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I never told my father I was proud of him. He died before I understood what he had sacrificed. I think about that sometimes.
{"implied_emotion": "regret and unexpressed love", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "acknowledgment of silence, present-tense rumination"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
When the priest chanted during my mother's last rites, I could not cry. I just watched the smoke go up and thought about nothing.
{"implied_emotion": "shock and dissociated grief", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "inability to cry, emotional blankness, fixation on smoke"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The morning I got the letter that I had passed my SLC, I ran all the way to my mother's field to tell her. I don't think my feet touched the ground.
{"implied_emotion": "elation and pride", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "running immediately to share news, hyperbolic physical description"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My husband's family did not welcome me at first. I ate my meals quickly and went to bed early. I tried to take up as little space as possible.
{"implied_emotion": "shame and social anxiety", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "minimizing presence, rushing meals, early withdrawal"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
Every time I passed the Shiva temple on the way to work, I would stop, even for just a moment, and press my palms together. It felt necessary.
{"implied_emotion": "reverence and habitual devotion", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "compulsive pausing, physical gesture of prayer, word 'necessary'"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My elder brother always got the better portion of everything — food, attention, schooling. I never said anything about it. What was there to say?
{"implied_emotion": "resentment and resignation", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "acknowledged disparity, rhetorical silence, dismissive closing question"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The night before my daughter's wedding, I sat alone in the kitchen for a long time. I kept checking if the stove was off even though I already knew it was.
{"implied_emotion": "anticipatory loss and anxiety", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "solitude, repetitive checking behavior, inability to settle"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
When the rains finally came after two dry years, my father went outside and just stood in it. He didn't come in for a long time.
{"implied_emotion": "relief bordering on reverence", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "prolonged standing in rain, refusal to take shelter"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I used to wake before dawn on the days we had enough rice for a full meal. I would just lie there listening to the quiet and feel something I cannot describe.
{"implied_emotion": "quiet contentment, possibly gratitude", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "early waking in stillness, speaker explicitly cannot name the feeling"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My mother never hugged us. That was not how things were done. But she always made sure we had the best piece of meat at dinner. Every time.
{"implied_emotion": "love expressed through provision, not physical affection", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "consistent prioritizing of children's portion despite cultural restraint"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The day we had to sell the land my grandfather had farmed, I couldn't look my father in the eye. Not that day, not for a week after.
{"implied_emotion": "shame and shared grief", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "sustained avoidance of eye contact over seven days"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
When the Kumari looked directly at me during the procession, I felt something pass through my whole body. I don't have a word for it.
{"implied_emotion": "sacred awe, possibly divine contact", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "full-body physical sensation, explicit statement of wordlessness"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I worked for that family for six years. When they dismissed me without explanation, I walked home the long way. I needed the time.
{"implied_emotion": "hurt and humiliation", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "deliberate delay in returning home, need for unstructured time to process"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
After we left the village I never went back. My brothers asked me to come for Dashain every year. I always found a reason not to.
{"implied_emotion": "avoidance grief, possibly unresolved loss", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "pattern of repeated refusal to return, no stated reason"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My youngest child learned to walk later than the others. I used to watch her trying again and again and my chest would do something strange.
{"implied_emotion": "tender protectiveness mixed with pride", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "physical chest sensation, specific observation of child's effort"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I read my husband's letter three times before I understood what he was saying. Then I folded it up and put it in the bottom of my trunk and did not take it out again.
{"implied_emotion": "suppressed anguish", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "deliberate concealment and refusal to re-engage with painful content"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
We laughed so much that day. My sides hurt for two days afterward. I don't remember what we were laughing about, only that it was very good.
{"implied_emotion": "pure uncomplicated joy", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "physical after-effect of laughter, content forgotten but feeling retained"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My father came to see me graduate. He had never been to the city before. He walked very carefully and looked at everything without saying a word.
{"implied_emotion": "overwhelm and contained pride", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "careful movement, silent observation, displacement from familiar environment"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
When the conflict was bad, I sent my children to stay with their grandmother. I told them it was a holiday. I don't know if they believed me.
{"implied_emotion": "fear and protective deception", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "displacement of children framed as holiday, uncertainty about children's belief"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My grandmother sang at the water tap every morning. I can still hear it. I have tried to remember the words but only the tune comes.
{"implied_emotion": "nostalgic longing", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "sensory memory retention, failed verbal recall, present-tense searching"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I was given in marriage at seventeen. I was not asked. I went. I made something from it. But I was not asked.
{"implied_emotion": "suppressed resentment and resilience", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "repeated emphasis on lack of agency, deliberate structure of resignation then adaptation"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The lama at the monastery looked at me for a long moment before he spoke. I felt as though he could see something I myself could not.
{"implied_emotion": "reverence and vulnerability", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "prolonged eye contact with religious authority, perception of being seen through"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
After all my children had moved away, the house was very quiet. I started talking to the plants. They are good listeners.
{"implied_emotion": "loneliness coped with through humor", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "behavioral change after emptying of household, self-aware humor as coping"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I saw my old village from the bus window after twenty years away. I pressed my face against the glass like a child.
{"implied_emotion": "yearning and homecoming grief", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "childlike physical gesture of pressing to glass, twenty-year absence"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My son corrected my Nepali in front of his friends once. He had grown up in the city and I spoke like a village person. I did not say anything.
{"implied_emotion": "humiliation and quiet hurt", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "public correction by own child, cultural-class displacement, silent response"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
When they said the prayers at the ghat, the smoke went straight up into the sky without bending. My aunt said that was a sign. I believed her.
{"implied_emotion": "grief seeking consolation through sacred sign", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "immediate acceptance of omen, context of cremation ritual"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I worked very hard to give my children what I did not have. I have never told them how hard. I don't want gratitude. I just wanted them to have it.
{"implied_emotion": "selfless love, possibly pride without need for recognition", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "deliberate silence about sacrifice, explicit rejection of gratitude"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The smell of juniper smoke still does something to me. Wherever I am, whatever I am doing, it takes me somewhere else entirely.

{"implied_emotion": "involuntary nostalgia, possibly spiritual memory", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "involuntary sensory trigger, present-tense displacement, juniper associated with ritual"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My sister and I argued the week before she died. We had argued many times before. But that time I did not call to make it right before she was gone.
{"implied_emotion": "guilt and unresolved grief", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "pattern of reconciliation broken once, permanent inability to repair due to death"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
During the puja, when the priest placed the tika on my forehead, I felt my whole body become very heavy and very still at the same time.
{"implied_emotion": "sacred awe and spiritual grounding", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "paradoxical physical sensation of heaviness and stillness during religious rite"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My husband and I never said I love you. Not once in forty years. But every morning he brought me tea before I was even fully awake. Every single morning.
{"implied_emotion": "deep love expressed through ritual care", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "forty-year daily act of service without verbal expression"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I held my breath every time I heard the gate open during the conflict years. Even now, sometimes, if a gate opens suddenly, I still hold my breath.
{"implied_emotion": "fear and persistent trauma response", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "past conditioned fear response continuing into present, involuntary physical reaction"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I cooked for the whole wedding — two days of cooking, barely sleeping. Nobody thanked me. But the food was finished. Every pot was empty. That was enough.
{"implied_emotion": "quiet pride and sufficiency without external validation", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "self-assessed completion as reward, explicit acceptance of no thanks"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My mother died in the night while I was asleep in the next room. I had sat with her all evening but fell asleep an hour before. I have never forgiven myself for that hour.
{"implied_emotion": "guilt and unresolvable grief", "named_by_speaker": true, "evidence": "explicit self-statement 'never forgiven myself', proximity to death without witness"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
When the new road finally reached our village, everyone celebrated. I stood at the edge and watched. I was happy, of course. But something else too, something I could not say.
{"implied_emotion": "ambivalent grief for the past", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "physical separation from celebration, acknowledgment of happiness alongside unnamed feeling"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My father read my school report slowly, moving his finger under each word. He did not say anything after. He just folded it and put it in his shirt pocket, close to his chest.
{"implied_emotion": "unexpressed pride", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "deliberate physical placement against chest, silence as emotional containment"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I gave the best years of my life to a family that is now scattered across four countries. When we are all together, which is almost never, I do not know what to feel.
{"implied_emotion": "grief and displacement mixed with love", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "explicit disorientation on rare reunions, sacrifice acknowledged without bitterness"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the underlying emotion as JSON with keys: implied_emotion, named_by_speaker, evidence. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The day I got my citizenship certificate, I sat with it in my lap for a long time before I put it away. Just sat with it.
{"implied_emotion": "quiet dignity and belonging", "named_by_speaker": false, "evidence": "prolonged physical holding of document, deliberate unhurried moment before storing"}
